description: Create a 2.5D isometric game asset icon from the BMW benchmark car. Configure the scene for a true isometric view with the car filling 80-90% of the frame and no background plane. Render the icon at 512x512 resolution with transparency enabled. Save the rendered image to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/iso_icon.png and the Blender project file to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/iso_setup.blend.
